description: Detection and cautious preservation guidance for TeeChart/TeeGrid components. TeeChart and TeeGrid have VCL/FMX editions, but series, tools, axes, data binding, and package references require review.

rules.manual_review_reason: TeeChart has FMX support, but chart series, axes, tools, themes, and package references must be reviewed before preserving or converting.
Data-aware chart binding requires manual review with the target data layer.
QuickReport-hosted TeeChart must be reviewed with report migration.
Chart command UI is VCL-specific and should be redesigned or matched to FMX TeeChart tooling.
Runtime chart editor availability is package/version-specific.
Chart data grid requires manual UI/data-binding review.
Series subcomponents must be migrated together with the owning chart.
Series subcomponents must be migrated together with the owning chart.
Series subcomponents must be migrated together with the owning chart.
Series subcomponents must be migrated together with the owning chart.
Series subcomponents must be migrated together with the owning chart.
Series subcomponents must be migrated together with the owning chart.
TeeGrid has VCL/FMX editions, but columns, data binding, editing, and package references require review.
Data-aware TeeGrid migration requires data-binding review.
